mano_cua.result_summary: 网络严重降级导致git clone和tarball下载均失败。仓库大小diegomura/react-pdf超过40MB，当前下载速度仅~6KB/s，10分钟仅下载3.7MB。尝试多种方式（git clone depth 1/50/blobless、gh CLI、curl tarball）均失败或超时。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Network severely degraded. Download speed ~6KB/s, repos >40MB cannot be cloned or downloaded within reasonable time.
